message:
Add scanner dedup/config pure function tests (56.7% → 64.5%)

Test parseBeadForDedup (10 cases), DedupIndex methods (Exists, GetBeadID,
FindingsForFile, CheckFindings, Stats, concurrent access),
ScanOptionsFromConfig (6 contexts), BridgeConfigFromConfig (5 severity maps),
ShouldAutoCreateBeads, ShouldAutoCloseBeads, estimateFileCentrality.
All target functions at 100% coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
